name: Burnt Sugar Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the evaporated milk, butter, and 2 cups of sugar in a saucepan. Heat until boiling.
2. Melt 1 cup of sugar in the saucepan, stirring constantly. Cook to soft ball stage.
3. Add vanilla and chopped nuts; beat until very firm.
4. Pour into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
5. Yield: 40 pieces.
